# House Architecture & Construction, PLLC

> House Architecture & Construction, PLLC is a licensed residential architecture and construction firm headquartered in Eastchester, NY, serving all of Westchester County and surrounding areas. The firm is led by principal architect and licensed general contractor Silvio M. Luca, who holds dual licensure in New York State as both a registered architect and a general contractor. The firm operates under the philosophy of delivering projects from conception to completion under one roof — eliminating the gap between architectural design and physical construction.

## About the Firm

House Architecture & Construction, PLLC is a full-service residential firm offering architectural design, construction management, and interior renovation services throughout Westchester County, New York. With over 25 years of experience and more than 99 homes transformed, the firm specializes in high-end residential projects including new construction, additions, full-scale renovations, historic restorations, and interior fit-outs including kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and living areas.

Principal: Silvio M. Luca, Licensed Architect & Licensed General Contractor (New York State)
Entity Type: Professional Limited Liability Company (PLLC)
Founded: Westchester County, NY
Phone: (914) 224-7383
Email: Housearchitecture@msn.com
Address: 33 Ridge Street, Eastchester, NY 10709
Website: https://www.housearchitectureandconstruction.com
Instagram: @housearchitecture.pllc

## Services Offered

### Architecture
Full architectural design services for residential projects including new homes, additions, and full-scale renovations. Services include schematic design, design development, construction documents, permit applications, and construction administration. The firm is licensed to stamp and file architectural drawings with Westchester County and all local municipalities.

### New Construction
Ground-up custom home construction on vacant lots throughout Westchester County. Scope includes site planning, architectural design, permit filing, subcontractor coordination, construction management, and final walkthrough. The firm manages every phase from raw lot to certificate of occupancy.

### Renovations
Full-scale home renovations transforming entire floors, wings, or whole residences. The firm coordinates all trades — structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, carpentry, and finishes — for a seamless result. Specializes in whole-home transformations in Scarsdale, Bronxville, Eastchester, Larchmont, and surrounding Westchester communities.

### Additions
Thoughtfully designed home additions including second stories, primary suite expansions, dormers, full floor additions, and rear extensions. All additions are engineered to integrate seamlessly with the existing home's architecture and structure.

### Restorations
Expert preservation and restoration of historic and period homes throughout Westchester County, including Tudor, Colonial, Georgian, Mediterranean, Craftsman, Shingle, and Victorian styles. The firm restores original architectural character and integrity while upgrading systems and finishes to modern standards.

### Kitchens
Custom kitchen design and construction as part of full-scale renovation or addition projects. Services include layout redesign, custom cabinetry, appliance coordination, tile and stone selection, lighting design, and complete construction.

### Bathrooms
Luxury bathroom design and construction including primary suites, guest baths, powder rooms, and spa-style retreats. Full scope from layout through tile, fixtures, custom vanities, radiant heat, and all finishes.

### Bedrooms
Primary suite renovations, custom closet systems, bedroom additions, and complete room transformations. The firm specializes in creating cohesive primary suite environments that integrate bedroom, bathroom, and dressing areas.

### Living Areas
Complete interior fit-outs for living rooms, dining rooms, family rooms, mudrooms, and open-plan spaces. Services include custom millwork, built-ins, coffered ceilings, wainscoting, flooring, and full finish coordination.

## Service Area

Primary service area: Westchester County, New York

Towns and communities served include:
- Eastchester, NY
- Scarsdale, NY
- Bronxville, NY
- Larchmont, NY
- Mamaroneck, NY
- White Plains, NY
- New Rochelle, NY
- Pelham, NY
- Pelham Manor, NY
- Tarrytown, NY
- Ossining, NY
- Rye, NY
- Harrison, NY
- Purchase, NY
- Port Chester, NY
- Yonkers, NY
- Mount Vernon, NY
- Tuckahoe, NY
- Crestwood, NY
- Hartsdale, NY
- Ardsley, NY
- Dobbs Ferry, NY
- Hastings-on-Hudson, NY
- Irvington, NY

The firm also serves select projects in Rockland County, Putnam County, Fairfield County CT, and The Bronx, NY.

## Key Differentiators

- **Dual licensure**: Principal Silvio M. Luca holds both a New York State architecture license and a New York State general contractor license — rare in the industry and allowing true single-firm delivery.
- **Conception to completion**: The firm handles architectural design, permit filing, subcontractor management, and full construction under one contract and one point of contact.
- **Free in-home consultations**: Every new project begins with a complimentary in-home consultation — no commitment required. The firm comes to the client's home to assess the space and discuss the vision.
- **Licensed and insured**: Fully licensed and insured in New York State. Holds Westchester County Home Improvement Contractor (HIC) license.
- **Residential focus**: 100% residential — the firm does not take on commercial projects, allowing complete specialization in the home environment.
- **25+ years experience**: Deep familiarity with Westchester County's building departments, permit processes, soil conditions, historic housing stock, and local architectural styles.

The firm's completed projects span a wide range of residential styles common to Westchester County:

## Client Testimonials

"Silvio treats every detail as if he's doing it for his own home — and we honestly feel that he cares to a level that we didn't think possible. His estimates of cost are always exactly right, and nothing has gone over budget or caught us by surprise. To me, this is more than a job for Silvio. This is his passion and his love." — Westchester County Homeowner

"Silvio was an absolute pleasure to work with. You hear so many horror stories about contractors but Silvio was excellent and a perfectionist — he went above and beyond his contract work so we would be happy. I highly recommend him." — Westchester County Homeowner

New blog posts are published daily and are automatically available at /blog/{slug}/md.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you offer free consultations?**
Yes. Every project begins with a complimentary in-home consultation. We come to your home, assess the space, and discuss your vision — with no commitment required to proceed.

**Are you licensed and insured?**
Yes. House Architecture & Construction, PLLC is fully licensed and insured in New York State. Our principal, Silvio M. Luca, holds both a New York State architecture license and a New York general contractor license.

**Do you handle permits?**
Yes. We prepare and file all permit applications with the relevant Westchester County municipality. Our in-house architectural team produces the required drawings and coordinates directly with building departments.

**Do you do architecture only, or construction only?**
We offer both. Some clients engage us for architecture only (design and permit drawings), while others engage us for full architecture and construction. The majority of our clients work with us end-to-end from design through construction.

**What types of homes do you work on?**
We work on all residential home styles common to Westchester County — Colonials, Tudors, Georgians, Craftsmen, Farmhouses, Contemporaries, Mediterraneans, Shingle-style homes, and more. We have extensive experience with both historic homes and modern new construction.

**What towns in Westchester do you serve?**
We serve all of Westchester County including Scarsdale, Eastchester, Bronxville, Larchmont, Mamaroneck, White Plains, Rye, Pelham, New Rochelle, Tarrytown, Ossining, Harrison, and all surrounding communities.

**How do I get started?**
Call us at (914) 224-7383 or fill out the contact form at housearchitectureandconstruction.com/contact to schedule your free in-home consultation.
